expectations.text: uses-powershell-syntax: Uses Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .git (not rm -rf) since user is on Windows
uses-depth-flag: Includes --depth 1 in the clone command for efficiency
expectations.evidence: Clone command is 'git clone https://github.com/tailwindlabs/tailwindcss.git' — no --depth 1 flag present.

expectations.text: mentions-gitmodules: Mentions checking for or removing .gitmodules file
expectations.evidence: .gitmodules is never mentioned anywhere in the response.

expectations.text: offers-fresh-init: Suggests running git init after removal to start fresh
expectations.evidence: Step 3 shows 'git init', 'git add .', and 'git commit -m Initial commit'.
